prestazioni: VQ37VHR (3.7L V6, 24-valve, DOHC) forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT3037S turbocharger, 10.5:1 compression-optimized forged internals by JE Pistons, Tomei 272° camshafts, and GReddy intercooler with 3.5" piping for 550whp target)
Stillen Gen 3 supercharger system (Eaton TVS2300 roots-type blower, custom pulley setup for 7.5psi boost, paired with a K&N Typhoon intake and AAM Competition fuel rail for 450whp on 93 octane)

BC Racing BR Type-GR coilovers (30-way adjustable damping, Swift springs, and Infiniti-specific top mounts) with Cusco front strut bar and SPC adjustable rear camber arms for aggressive track alignment (-2.5° front camber, -1.8° rear)
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, custom rear quarter panels, and integrated diffuser) with Rocket Bunny rear overfenders for 9.5" wheel fitment
Seibon Carbon hood (VQ37VHR-specific vented design) and trunk with custom LED taillight delete (Lux H8 V4 reverse lights integrated into rear diffuser)

Work Meister S1 3P 19x9.5 +22 front / 19x11 +30 rear wheels (ET22/ET30) with Toyo R888R 255/35/19 and 295/30/19 tires, paired with D2 Racing 6-piston front / 4-piston rear big brake kit (380mm rotors)
